_comment: 8 static quest props. gpt-image-1 seed (single object, plain white bg) -> Meshy image-to-3d lowpoly should_remesh triangle NO rigging -> genquestprops.js quantize -> questprops.js (ENV_PROPS format). `m` = target real-world size in meters pinned to `axis` (x|y|z) at convert time. `cat` groups. `solid` -> AABB collider.

trapdoor.seed: a heavy square wooden cellar trapdoor set flush in a stone floor, thick weathered planks bound with rusty iron bands, a round iron pull-ring handle in the center, closed, seen from a low three-quarter angle, plain white background
trapdoor.notes: shared: Gains Cave hatch (q7), false-bottom dumpster lid (q4/q8), roof-stash hatch (q3). Hinge-open animation.

manhole_cover.seed: a round cast-iron street manhole cover, dark grey metal with a raised geometric grid pattern and lettering around the rim, lying flat, seen from a slight three-quarter angle, plain white background
manhole_cover.notes: q5 Race Track Rd center lane; pry with Lockpick -> Manhole Room shaft (q10).

cage_lift.seed: an old wrought-iron cage elevator / dumbwaiter, a small black metal box lift with a folding scissor-gate door and a rope-and-pulley on top, industrial antique, plain white background
cage_lift.notes: q3 board-room lift + shaft down to sub-lake (q10 shared). Descends.

facility_module.seed: a modular underground sci-fi bunker interior wall section, riveted grey metal panels with pipes, a round pressure door and a glowing cyan control console, retro-industrial, plain white background
facility_module.notes: q10 sub-lake facility interior kit; tile into rooms/corridors.

arcade_portal.seed: a retro arcade cabinet with its screen replaced by a swirling glowing neon portal vortex of cyan and magenta light, the wooden cabinet body dark with faded side art, plain white background
arcade_portal.notes: q6 arcade entry portal + glitch-world set piece.

vault_door.seed: a massive round steel bank vault door, brushed chrome with a large central spoked handle wheel and a ring of locking bolts, set in a thick concrete frame, half open, plain white background
vault_door.notes: q4 Regions vault door (+ safety-deposit box wall). Swing-open.

hollow_oak.seed: a lone gnarled old oak tree with a dark hollow knot-hole opening in its thick trunk, bare twisted branches, low-poly stylized, plain white background
hollow_oak.notes: q8 Hollow Oak dead-drop (SE preserve 165,120); Biscuit sniffs it (q9).

seance_table.seed: a long formal dinner party table set for a seance, dark wood, white tablecloth, place settings of plates and wine glasses and lit candelabra, a few chairs around it, plain white background
